introSection: Super L&S Coaster (Japanese: スーパー L＆Sコースター) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Kijima Kogen in Beppu, Ōita, Japan. The L&S stands for Loop and Spiral. The coaster was originally called Super LS Coaster, but this was changed to not confuse the ride with Vekoma's SLC.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Green track with blue rails and black supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train was replaced around 2009. The new train is made by an unknown manufacturer, but the restraints resemble those seen on newer Togo sit-down coasters.

sections.title: External Links
sections.content: * Super LS Coaster on the parks website (Japanese)

fullText:
Super L&S Coaster (Japanese: スーパー L＆Sコースター) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Kijima Kogen in Beppu, Ōita, Japan. The L&S stands for Loop and Spiral. The coaster was originally called Super LS Coaster, but this was changed to not confuse the ride with Vekoma's SLC.



Green track with blue rails and black supports.

The train was replaced around 2009. The new train is made by an unknown manufacturer, but the restraints resemble those seen on newer Togo sit-down coasters.


 * Super LS Coaster on the parks website (Japanese)
